faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to parents' questions about EPath Education
faq.q1: What age group is EPath suitable for?
faq.a1: EPath provides programs from Kindergarten (3-5 years) to High School (15-18 years).
faq.q2: Can my child attend EPath while studying at another school?
faq.a2: Absolutely! EPath's Blended Learning allows students to combine schools.
faq.q3: What are the tuition and financial policies?
faq.a3: EPath offers flexible tuition packages from part-time to full-time.
faq.a4: Yes! Edmentum is accredited by Cognia and WASC.
faq.q5: Can my child study for an American Dual Diploma after Middle School?
faq.a5: Absolutely! EPath provides Dual Diploma program.

testimonials.title: What Parents Say About EPath
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by hundreds of families across Vietnam

list.name: Ms. Nguyen Thi Lan
list.quote: My child who couldn't write English, after 6 months at EPath now studies online without reminders. What impressed me most is the Blended Learning method that gives flexibility while ensuring quality.

list.name: Mr. Tran Van Minh
list.quote: My spouse and I are busy with work and don't have much time to tutor our child. EPath has taken over tracking progress and providing detailed periodic reports for us.

list.name: Ms. Pham Thi Huong
list.quote: We've tried many centers but EPath is the only one with a continuous learning pathway from kindergarten to high school. My child's knowledge isn't interrupted and is much more confident taking Cambridge exams.

footer.description: International academic pathway from Elementary to High School. Blended Learning - Edmentum International - Personalized learning pathways.
